app.name: Feedbot
app.tagline: Turn community chat into a structured product backlog.

common.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

login.title: Sign in to Feedbot
login.subtitle: We'll email you a magic link. No password needed.
login.sent_subtitle: If an account matches {{email}}, a sign-in link has been sent. Open it on this device to keep the cross-device protection active.
login.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

magic.failed_subtitle: Magic links expire after 15 minutes and can only be used once.

security.title: Active sessions
security.subtitle: Each entry is a browser where you're signed in. Revoke any you don't recognise.
security.sign_out_all_confirm: This will end every other Feedbot session for your account. Continue?

setup.title: Set up your Feedbot
setup.subtitle: You're the first user — let's create the owner account for this instance.
setup.email_help: A magic-link sign-in is emailed here. Make sure you have access to it.
setup.tenant_help: Shown in the dashboard header. You can change it later.
setup.sent_subtitle: We've sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Open it to finish setup.
setup.fallback_subtitle: {{email}} is now the owner of this instance.
setup.fallback_alert_title: Email not configured on this deployment
setup.fallback_alert_body: We couldn't deliver a magic link because SMTP isn't configured. Use the one-time link below to sign in now, then set EMAIL_BACKEND=smtp before opening this instance to other users.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty_subtitle: Create your first project to start receiving feedback.

create_dialog.title: Create a project
create_dialog.slug_help: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Used in URLs.
create_dialog.slug_invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dashes, underscores.

delete_dialog.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete_dialog.body: This permanently deletes the project, every feedback, every API key, and every chat link. This cannot be undone.

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.description: Issue keys to authenticate MCP clients and the HTTP API. Keys are scoped to this project — a key for one project cannot read another.
api_keys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to connect Claude Code, Cursor, or any other MCP-compatible client.
api_keys.create_description: Pick a label you'll recognize later (e.g. "Claude Code on laptop"). Choose the smallest scope that works.
api_keys.scope_read: Read — list and get feedback only
api_keys.reveal_title: Copy this key now — it won't be shown again
api_keys.reveal_body: This is the only time the full secret is displayed. Store it in your MCP client config (or password manager) before dismissing this card.
api_keys.revoke_body: "{{label}}" will stop authenticating immediately. Any MCP client using it will fail on next call. This cannot be undone.

mcp.title: Connect via MCP
mcp.description: Wire any MCP-compatible client (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Zed, …) to this project. Same server, three formats — pick the one your client uses.
mcp.no_keys_body: Create one above first. The snippets below need a key to authenticate.
mcp.using_revealed: Using the key you just created ({{label}}) — it's baked into the snippets below.
mcp.placeholder_help: Snippets show <YOUR_API_KEY> as a placeholder. Replace it with the actual fbk_live_… secret you copied when the key was created.
mcp.key_picker_label: Which key to embed in the snippets?
mcp.cli_help: Run this in your terminal to register the server with Claude Code:
mcp.json_help: Paste into .mcp.json (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf) or claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop):
mcp.generic_intro: For any client that doesn't use one of the formats above, configure these three fields:
mcp.docs_hint: Need OAuth instead of a Bearer key?

members.title: Members
members.description: Members are tenant users who can see this project. Owners and admins always have access; this list controls visibility for member-role users.
members.empty: No project-scoped members yet. Owners and admins always have access.
members.add_description: Pick a tenant user. Only member-role users need explicit project access — admins and owners see every project.
members.no_candidates: No tenant members are available to add. Invite one from the Team page first.
members.remove_body: "{{email}}" will lose access to this project immediately. They keep their tenant account and any other project memberships.

chat_links.title: Telegram chats
chat_links.description: Connect Telegram groups to this project. Generate a 15-minute invite, open the deep link to add the bot, and feedback messages from the group land here.
chat_links.empty: No Telegram chats connected yet. Generate an invite above to add the bot to a group.
chat_links.token_body: Click the button to open Telegram and add the bot to a group. The token expires at {{expires}} and works once.
chat_links.no_bot_hint: FEEDBOT_TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME isn't set on this deployment, so we can't render a deep link. Copy the token, then add your bot to a group manually and DM it `/start link_<token>`.
chat_links.disconnect_body: New messages from "{{chat}}" will stop creating feedback. Existing feedback rows are kept.

feedbacks.title: Feedback
feedbacks.empty: No feedback yet — connect a Telegram chat to start receiving.

detail.reply_label: Queue a reply to the reporter
detail.reply_placeholder: Hi! We just shipped this in v2.4.0…
detail.reply_queued: Reply queued — sent on next sync
detail.request_more_info_help: Sends the message and flips status back to 'triaged' so the loop is visibly open.
detail.note_placeholder: Needs design review before we close this.

team.title: Team

invite_dialog.title: Invite a teammate
invite_dialog.role_member: Member — see and triage assigned projects only

team.transfer_owner_body: You'll be demoted to admin. The new owner can promote you back.

llm.title: LLM auto-triage
llm.api_key_set: Stored — key is encrypted and never shown again.
llm.monthly_budget_help: Stop calling the provider when this month's running cost reaches this number. Leave empty for no cap.

errors.503: The server is unavailable. Try again shortly.
